_comment: P33 content-source additions. Load via: python3 tools/source_currency.py seed-sources canonical-sources/content-sources-p33-seed.json. Fills coverage gaps the audit found: the live FTC eCFR text, a broader DIY cost-vendor base, and an upstream for the github-seo methodology data file.
name: FTC Endorsement Guides, eCFR 16 CFR Part 255 (live text)
extraction_hint: live authoritative 16 CFR Part 255 text; the 2024 amendments and any staff guidance on AI / virtual-influencer endorsements; clear-and-conspicuous disclosure

name: Amazon (materials pricing)
extraction_hint: list price for a named product/model at fetch time; cite the URL and date, never a remembered price

name: Rust-Oleum paint and finishes (pricing reference)
extraction_hint: paint/finish product lines and MSRP where listed; retailer price is the authority for actual cost

name: Michaels (craft materials pricing)
extraction_hint: craft and decor materials list price at fetch time; cite URL and date

name: GitHub OSS SEO methodology (curated crawl)
extraction_hint: notable open-source SEO/keyword tooling and methodology repos (SERP-overlap clustering, PAA expansion, topical maps); re-crawl for new techniques feeding github-seo-methodology.json
